name: Pumpkin Pie Hawaiian
recipeIngredient: 1 baked 9-inch crumb crust - OR - pastry crust
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, mix gelatin, brown sugar, salt and spices. Stir in milk, mashed pumpkin and slightly beaten egg yolks.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until hot throughout and gelatin is dissolved (8 to 10 minutes).
3. Set the mixture in cold water to cool until firm but not hard, stirring occasionally.
4. In a large mixing bowl, beat egg whites until foamy. Gradually beat in powdered sugar until stiff peaks form. Set aside.
5. Without washing the beaters, beat the cooled pumpkin mixture until smooth and fluffy. Gently fold into beaten whites.
6. Heap lightly into pie shell. Refrigerate for 3 hours.
7. Spread with ginger-flavored Whipped Cream Topping before serving.
Whipped Cream Topping:
In a chilled bowl, combine 1 cup (1/2 pint) whipping cream, 3 tablespoons C&H Powdered Sugar and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla or spice (ginger, cinnamon, etc.). Beat until just stiff enough to hold its shape. Spread in swirls over pie, or use as dessert topping. Keep refrigerated until served. It will hold up for hours!
